brokerUrl.title: MQTT Broker URL
brokerUrl.description: MQTT broker URL used by echonetlite2mqtt.

topicPrefix.title: Topic Prefix
topicPrefix.description: Base echonetlite2mqtt ELAPI topic prefix without the device ID.

enableTemperatureSensor.title: Expose Temperature Sensor
enableTemperatureSensor.description: Uses the current unknown_F1 byte mapping. Keep disabled unless this mapping matches your model.

enableAirQualitySensor.title: Expose Air Quality Sensor
enableAirQualitySensor.description: Reserved for verified PM mappings. Disabled by default.

enableHumidifierService.title: Expose HumidifierDehumidifier
enableHumidifierService.description: Uses the COCORO Air-compatible unknown_F3 0009 command family for humidifier ON/OFF.

enableModeSwitches.title: Expose Special Mode Switches
enableModeSwitches.description: Expose Night, Pollen, and Realize modes as separate HomeKit switches.
